gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
gems.whyWatch: 史诗不止于战场，更在归途的每一寸人性挣扎。
gems.whyWatchEn: An epic that transcends battle scenes, diving deep into the human struggle of a long and treacherous homecoming.
gems.audience: 喜欢《奥德赛》原著、古典神话爱好者、追求宏大叙事与深度人物刻画的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of Homer's Odyssey, mythology enthusiasts, viewers who appreciate grand narratives with deep character exploration.
